title: Airnest
desc: Welcome to our Flight Booking System! This platform streamlines the flight booking process, providing users with a convenient and user-friendly experience. The system includes secure transactions, comprehensive database management, and efficient installation procedures. This is a database management course final project.

title: Traffic Simulation and Modeling
desc: We developed a project to address the issues that some of our metropolises, were facing. We decided to look into the fields of traffic management in view of the major issues of traffic jams, accidents on the road, and poor road design. The primary goal of this project is to use Unity to develop a robust traffic simulation platform which focuses on realistic vehicle interactions, real-world road layouts, and the application of traffic laws.

title: R2D2 Robot
desc: I have participated in the 2024th edition of the National Robotics Competition hosted annually by the EMINES E-tech club.  My team and I developed within the 24-hour hackathon, an R2-D2 like robot, inspired by the Star Wars series. The robot had full rotational mobility, Bluetooth controls, ultrasound captors for obstacle detection, and a buzzer to signal close objects.

title: Geoblox Dash
desc: Collaborated with 3D modeler @rogenus to develop an engaging game. Players collect orbs to enhance speed and trade them for in-game currency to purchase upgrades. Achieved a significant milestone of 1.7 million visits.

title: Jacard recommendation system
desc: Developed a console application that simulates a Jaccard similarity-based video recommendation system. Utilized a custom dataset of videos and users to enhance algorithmic accuracy.

title: Custom Language Mapper
desc: Designed a lexer to compile 'Darija' language code into Python using a proprietary syntax. Transformed 'Darija' scripts into equivalent Python code for seamless integration.

title: Space disasters
desc: Designed a survival game set in space where players navigate natural disasters across various planets. Unlocked special effects and survived extreme conditions. Accumulated 1.6 million visits.

title: Food Run
desc: Co-authored a game with @rogenus focused on health and fitness. Players race to maintain a healthy physique by avoiding junk food and participating in sports activities. Surpassed 5 million visits.

title: Pillar and Moon Abilities game prototype
desc: Participated in a 4-hour coding challenge themed 'pillars and moon'. Developed specialized character abilities within the given timeframe.

title: Mini Roleplay game
desc: Created a test roleplay game that garnered 693K visits, demonstrating initial success and engagement.

title: ASYNC automod
desc: Developed an interactive Discord bot with features such as currency collection, weapon acquisition, and attack mechanics. Boasts auto-moderation, manual moderation support, and user-friendly configuration via a reaction-based menu. Achieved a significant milestone of 12K servers and 100K users.
